name: Bestial Form
description: This model gains the following trigger on all of its attack actions:

universal_triggers.name: Surprise Reformation
universal_triggers.text: Enemy only. Replace this model with Myranda and it heals 2.

extraction_notes: This upgrade grants a universal trigger that applies to all attack actions of the equipped model, rather than granting specific actions.
The trigger has the restriction 'Enemy only' meaning it can only be used when attacking enemy models.
